name: vscode
description: Install Visual Studio Code with extensions for development.
verify: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "${vscodePath}='C:\Program Files\Microsoft VS Code\Code.exe'; ${log}=Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\verify\vscode-verify.log'; if (Test-Path ${vscodePath}) { Set-Content -Path ${log} -Value 'VSCode installed successfully'; Set-Content -Path (Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\smoke\vscode-smoke.txt') -Value 'vscode_ok' } else { 'VSCode executable not found at ' + ${vscodePath} | Out-File -FilePath ${log} -Encoding UTF8 }"
